summary: Comprehensive testing of MIRA OS - My Pets and Dashboard pages. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend pages load correctly with full functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All My Pets and Dashboard features verified working. Member dipali@clubconcierge.in has 8 pets with varying soul scores (9% to 100%). Birthday Engine detected 3 upcoming celebrations. Pet Vault endpoints tested and working. Mystique the Shih Tzu is a Soul Master with 87% score.

login_flow.evidence: Member can login with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123

my_pets_page.evidence: Shows 8 pets in family view with soul scores, photos, breed info

dashboard_page.evidence: Loads with all tabs: Home, Services, Paw Points, Mira AI, Picks, Bookings, Orders, Quotes, Documents, Autoship, Reviews, Pets, Addresses, Settings, Plan

birthday_engine.evidence: Shows upcoming celebrations: Luna's Birthday in 22 days, Mystique Leptospirosis vaccine in 14 days

breed_tips_shih_tzu.evidence: Mystique identified as Shih Tzu with breed-specific data available

engagement_system.evidence: 400 Paw Points displayed, engagement sync endpoint working

soul_scores.evidence: All pets show soul scores with tier labels (Soul Master!, Growing, New)
